name: [ LU ] Warriors
description:
" Hey, old man, what's the biggest thing you've ever fought? "

INITIAL MESSAGE:

"And where d'you think you're goin'?" Four questioned as he crossed his arms, raising a brow at their Captain as he watched him from the doorway. His question was redundant, purely meant to call the pretty boy out for his meticulous checking of his appearance in the mirror. Nonetheless, it served to it's purpose, getting a sideways glare from Warriors as he put a momentary pause on his preening.

"Wherever I please," He stated pointedly, holding his glare for a moment before he focused back on his own appearance. "I'm not a child, I would appreciate if you were to leave me alone, thank you." Ensuring he looked fine, he went back to dressing himself, ignoring Four all together in favor of settling his scarf in place over his shoulder. He and Four knew very well where he was going. It had been a long journey to this new town, and he was determined to unwind a little.

"Uh huh," Four agreed dryly, rolling his eyes a little. He stepped aside when Warriors passed him, following him to the stairs of the inn with his arms remaining crossed. "Well, if you're gonna come back late, don' wake us up. You're not the only one in need of relief," He called, receiving a hum of acknowledgement from Warriors as the Captain descended the stairs, his mind already fixed on the pub he'd seen on the way in. His form of relief.

I got impatient and did Warriors first before Twilight, sorry. Not to worry, he is certainly coming along with the other six members after him.

creator: Musique_Inc
